finding: The deployment evidence chain was present but lacked a dedicated executable guard against stage removal, ordering regression, or CI detachment.

requirements: deployment remains gated by a successful Cloudflare access probe
served identity and exact-commit hostname checks remain present
acceptance precedes final evidence manifest construction
the contract workflow watches both Cloudflare workflows and executes the guard

privacy_boundary: No private chat, health material, credentials, account identifiers, diagnosis, or treatment claims were included.
limits: String-level workflow contracts detect required fragments and ordering, not full YAML semantics.
No live Cloudflare hostname or deployment identity was established.
No GitHub Actions execution was observed for the binding commit at inspection time.
The existing external secret and environment blocker remains unresolved.
falsification_route: Remove, reorder, rename, or detach a required deployment evidence stage and run node --test cloudflare-static/cloudflare-deployment-workflow-contract.test.mjs; the guard should fail closed.
